description.en: The birthplace of jajangmyeon in Korea, housed in the original Gonghwachun restaurant building. Now a museum preserving the history of Korea's most beloved comfort food and the story of Incheon's Chinese immigrant community.
description.ko: 한국 짜장면의 발상지인 공화춘 원래 건물. 현재 한국인의 소울푸드 짜장면의 역사와 인천 화교 커뮤니티 이야기를 보존하는 박물관.

best_times.en: Morning 10 AM-12 PM for quieter visit

tips: The original building where jajangmyeon was born
Small but fascinating history of Korean-Chinese food
Combine with a Chinatown food crawl after

description.en: The most famous restaurant in Incheon Chinatown, included in the Blue Ribbon Survey (Korea's restaurant guide) in 2023-2024. Known for their original white jajangmyeon made with white soybean paste aged 60 days.
description.ko: 인천 차이나타운에서 가장 유명한 중식당. 2023-2024 블루리본 서베이 등재. 60일 숙성 하얀 콩 춘장으로 만든 하얀짜장면 원조.

best_times.en: Lunch 11:30 AM-2 PM, avoid weekend peak

tips: Try the white jajangmyeon — unique to this restaurant
White soybean paste aged for 60 days
4-storey building with elevator

description.en: A beloved Chinatown restaurant featured on multiple Korean TV shows. Famous for Baeknyeon Jajangmyeon — made using the 100-year-old original method without MSG. Impressive two-floor Chinese decor.
description.ko: 다수 한국 TV 프로그램 출연의 차이나타운 맛집. 100년 전 원래 방식 그대로 MSG 없이 만든 백년짜장면이 유명. 인상적인 2층 중국풍 인테리어.

tips: Baeknyeon (100-year) jajangmyeon uses the original recipe
No MSG — taste the authentic flavor
Featured on Wednesday Gourmet Club and Tasty Guys

description.en: Run by the granddaughter of the legendary Gonghwachun chef, preserving the original jajangmyeon recipe for over a century. The most authentic connection to the birth of jajangmyeon in Korea.
description.ko: 전설적인 공화춘 요리사의 손녀가 운영. 100년 이상 원조 짜장면 레시피를 보존. 한국 짜장면 탄생의 가장 정통한 맛.

tips: Direct descendant of the original Gonghwachun chef
Over a century of the same recipe
The most historically authentic jajangmyeon experience

description.en: A street food stall selling only one thing: Chinese-style oven-baked dumplings cooked in a traditional clay oven. Flavors range from classic meat to sweet potato, red bean, and mala spicy.
description.ko: 옹기병 화덕에서 구워내는 중국식 만두만 판매하는 곳. 고기 맛부터 고구마, 팥, 마라 맛까지 다양한 맛의 화덕만두.

tips: Baked in a traditional clay oven — crispy outside, juicy inside
Try the mala flavor for something unique
Best eaten hot and fresh

description.en: The original dakgangjeong (sweet and spicy fried chicken) at Sinpo International Market. Crispy, sticky, addictive — this is where the famous Korean fried chicken snack was perfected.
description.ko: 신포국제시장의 원조 닭강정. 바삭하고 달콤매콤한 중독성 있는 맛. 유명한 한국 치킨 간식이 완성된 곳.

tips: The original dakgangjeong — crispy, sweet, and spicy
Located in Sinpo International Market
Buy a box to snack on while exploring the market

description.en: The world's largest underground shopping mall (Guinness certified 2015) stretching 1.8km with 1,408 stores. Known as the 'underground dungeon' for its maze-like layout selling clothes, accessories, and cosmetics at bargain prices.
description.ko: 1.8km에 1,408개 상점이 있는 세계 최대 지하상가 (2015 기네스 인증). 미로 같은 구조로 '지하던전'이라 불림. 의류, 액세서리, 화장품 할인.

best_times.en: Weekday afternoon 2-6 PM for fewer crowds

tips: Follow the guide lines on the floor to avoid getting lost
1,408 stores — the 'underground dungeon' of shopping
30-40 minutes from central Seoul by subway

description.en: A crescent-moon-shaped island famous for its scenic seaside promenade, fresh seafood restaurants, and stunning red sunsets. Take a cruise around the island or ride the amusement park rides along the waterfront.
description.ko: 초승달 모양의 섬으로 해안 산책로, 신선한 해산물 식당, 붉은 석양이 유명. 유람선 크루즈와 해안가 놀이공원도 즐길 수 있음.

tips: Time your visit for sunset — the red sky is spectacular
Fresh seafood restaurants line the waterfront
Take the cruise for ocean views of the island

description.en: A massive seafood market at the coastal wharf selling 150+ types of fresh marine products caught by local fishermen from the Yellow Sea. Buy fish downstairs and have it prepared at restaurants upstairs.
description.ko: 서해안 어부들이 잡은 150가지 이상의 신선한 해산물을 판매하는 대형 수산시장. 1층에서 구매 후 2층 식당에서 바로 조리 가능.

best_times.en: Early morning 5-8 AM for freshest catch

tips: Buy fish downstairs, eat upstairs — the full market experience
Over 150 types of marine products
Early morning has the freshest selection

description.en: A traditional market on Ganghwa Island that opens every 5 days, selling local specialties including ginseng, salted seafood, turnips, and wormwood. A glimpse into rural Korean market culture.
description.ko: 5일마다 열리는 강화도 전통 시장. 인삼, 젓갈, 순무, 쑥 등 지역 특산물 판매. 시골 한국 시장 문화를 체험할 수 있는 곳.

tips: Opens every 5 days — check the schedule
Ganghwa ginseng is famous and high quality
Authentic rural market atmosphere

description.en: A stunning urban park in Songdo International City with waterways, walking paths, and bike rentals. Surrounded by futuristic architecture, it's where Incheon's modern face meets green space. Perfect for a relaxing afternoon.
description.ko: 송도국제도시의 수로, 산책로, 자전거 대여가 있는 도심 공원. 미래적 건축물에 둘러싸인 도시 속 녹지. 여유로운 오후 산책에 완벽.

best_times.en: Late afternoon for golden light on the buildings

tips: Rent a kayak or canoe on the waterway
Beautiful at night with lit-up buildings reflected in water
Bike rentals available for a longer explore

description.en: A 12-year Songdo local institution famous for spicy stir-fried baby octopus (jukkumi bokkeum). Featured on Korean food shows. The locals' go-to for a fiery, satisfying meal near Central Park.
description.ko: 12년 전통의 송도 로컬 맛집. 매콤한 주꾸미볶음이 유명. 한국 맛집 방송 출연. 센트럴파크 근처에서 현지인이 가는 곳.

address.en: Near Songdo Central Park, Yeonsu-gu, Incheon

tips: Spicy baby octopus (jukkumi) is the must-order
12 years of Songdo local reputation
Pair with soju for the full Korean experience

description.en: One of the oldest Chinese restaurants near Sinpo-dong, recommended by 30-year Incheon locals. Everything on the menu is reliable — from jajangmyeon to tangsuyuk. No-frills authenticity.
description.ko: 신포동 옆 가장 오래된 중식당 중 하나. 30년 인천 토박이 추천. 짜장면부터 탕수육까지 뭘 시켜도 무난한 노포 중식당.

tips: Recommended by 30-year Incheon residents
Everything on the menu is solid
Old-school no-frills Chinese-Korean dining

description.en: A vibrant traditional market near Chinatown known for dakgangjeong (sweet crispy chicken), dumplings, and diverse street food. More local and authentic than the tourist-facing Chinatown shops.
description.ko: 차이나타운 근처의 활기찬 전통시장. 닭강정, 만두, 다양한 길거리 음식으로 유명. 관광지보다 더 로컬하고 진정성 있는 시장.

tips: More authentic local vibe than Chinatown
Perfect for a street food crawl
Try manandu (dumplings) and dakgangjeong

description.en: A charming fishing port and market south of Songdo where you can buy the freshest shrimp, crabs, and shellfish. The adjacent Sorae Ecology Park is a hidden gem for birdwatching and salt flats.
description.ko: 송도 남쪽의 어항과 수산시장. 가장 신선한 새우, 꽃게, 조개를 구매 가능. 인접한 소래생태공원은 조류관찰과 염전이 있는 숨은 명소.

best_times.en: Morning 7-10 AM for fresh catch, autumn for crabs
best_times.ko: 오전 7-10시 신선한 해산물, 가을이 꽃게 시즌

tips: Autumn is blue crab season — the best time
Adjacent Sorae Ecology Park has salt flats and birdwatching
Buy seafood and eat at the nearby restaurants

description.en: A Bupyeong Chinese restaurant recommended by Incheon locals as the neighborhood's best. Authentic Chinese-Korean cuisine in an area most tourists never reach. True local eating experience.
description.ko: 인천 토박이가 추천하는 부평 최고의 중식당. 관광객이 거의 찾지 않는 지역의 정통 중화요리. 진짜 로컬 식사 경험.

tips: Incheon locals' pick for Bupyeong's best Chinese food
Far from tourist areas — truly local
Good starting point before Bupyeong underground mall

description.en: A observation deck on Ganghwa Island where you can see North Korea across the estuary on a clear day. One of the closest civilian viewpoints to the North. Combines history education with dramatic coastal scenery.
description.ko: 맑은 날 강 건너 북한을 볼 수 있는 강화도 전망대. 민간인이 접근 가능한 가장 가까운 북한 조망 시설 중 하나. 역사 교육과 해안 절경의 조화.

best_times.en: Clear mornings for best visibility of North Korea
best_times.ko: 맑은 아침에 북한 조망이 가장 선명

tips: Bring binoculars — or use the ones provided
Clear days only for views across to North Korea
Combine with Ganghwa Island history tour
